history.en: The Scottish Fold is a sweet, charming breed. She is an easy cat to live with and to care for. She is affectionate and is comfortable with all members of her family. Her tail should be handled gently. Folds are known for sleeping on their backs, and for sitting with their legs stretched out and their paws on their belly. This is called the "Buddha Position".
history.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫是一种甜美、迷人的品种。它是一种容易相处和照顾的猫。它深情且与所有家庭成员相处融洽。它的尾巴应该轻柔地对待。折耳猫以仰卧睡觉和伸腿坐着、爪子放在肚子上而闻名。这被称为“佛陀姿势”。

overview.en: The Scottish Fold is a sweet, affectionate, and intelligent breed known for its unique folded ears and round, owl-like face. These cats are loyal, playful, and highly social, forming strong bonds with all family members. They are gentle and loving, often seeking out human companionship without being demanding. Scottish Folds are known for their calm demeanor and adaptability, making them excellent companions. They have a distinctive habit of sleeping on their backs and sitting in the 'Buddha Position' with legs stretched out and paws on their belly. While they enjoy interactive play, they are also content to relax quietly. Their gentle nature extends to children and other pets, and they thrive in a stable, loving environment. Overall, the Scottish Fold is a charming, easygoing cat that brings joy and warmth to any home.
overview.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫是一种甜美、深情且聪明的猫种，以其独特的折耳和圆润的猫头鹰般的面容而闻名。这些猫忠诚、顽皮且非常善于社交，与所有家庭成员建立牢固的联系。它们温柔可爱，经常寻求人类的陪伴，但不会过于苛求。苏格兰折耳猫以冷静的性格和适应性强而著称，是极好的伴侣。它们有独特的习惯，比如仰面睡觉以及以‘佛陀姿势’坐着，双腿伸直，爪子放在肚子上。虽然它们喜欢互动游戏，但也满足于安静地放松。它们温和的天性延伸至儿童和其他宠物，并在稳定、充满爱的环境中茁壮成长。总体而言，苏格兰折耳猫是一种迷人、随和的猫，为任何家庭带来欢乐和温暖。

care.en: Daily care for a Scottish Fold is straightforward but requires consistency. Brush their short to medium coat weekly to reduce shedding and prevent mats, paying special attention during seasonal changes. Their folded ears need gentle cleaning every week with a vet-recommended solution and cotton ball—never use cotton swabs deep inside the ear. Trim their nails every two weeks and provide a scratching post. Daily play sessions of 15-20 minutes with interactive toys satisfy their exercise needs and mental stimulation. Scottish Folds are prone to obesity, so monitor their weight and encourage activity. Annual veterinary check-ups are essential, with special attention to joint health due to their genetic predisposition to osteochondrodysplasia. Keep their litter box clean and provide fresh water daily. With proper care, they remain healthy and happy companions.
care.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫的日常护理简单但需要坚持。每周刷一次它们短到中等的被毛，以减少脱毛和防止打结，换毛季节尤其要注意。它们的折耳需要每周用兽医推荐的溶液和棉球轻轻清洁——切勿使用棉签深入耳道。每两周修剪一次指甲，并提供猫抓板。每天用互动玩具进行15-20分钟的游戏，满足它们的运动需求和智力刺激。苏格兰折耳猫容易肥胖，因此需监测体重并鼓励活动。每年进行兽医检查，由于它们有骨软骨发育不良的遗传倾向，需特别关注关节健康。保持猫砂盆清洁，每天提供新鲜饮水。通过适当的护理，它们能保持健康快乐。

training.en: Scottish Folds are highly intelligent and eager to please, making them responsive to positive reinforcement training. Use treats, praise, and clicker training to teach basic commands like 'sit,' 'stay,' or 'come.' Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain their interest. They can learn to use a scratching post, litter box, and even walk on a harness with patience. Avoid punishment, as they are sensitive and may become withdrawn. Puzzle toys and food-dispensing games tap into their problem-solving skills and prevent boredom. Socialization from kittenhood is important—expose them to gentle handling, different people, and other pets. Their loyal and loving nature means they thrive on routine and clear communication. With consistency and kindness, training becomes a bonding experience.
training.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫非常聪明且乐于取悦主人，因此对正面强化训练反应良好。使用零食、表扬和响片训练来教授基本指令，如‘坐下’、‘等待’或‘过来’。保持每次训练简短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的兴趣。它们可以通过耐心学会使用猫抓板、猫砂盆，甚至适应穿戴胸背带。避免惩罚，因为它们敏感，可能会变得退缩。益智玩具和食物分配游戏能激发它们的解决问题能力，防止无聊。从小进行社会化训练很重要——让它们习惯温和的抚摸、不同的人和其他宠物。它们忠诚且充满爱意的天性意味着它们喜欢规律和清晰的沟通。通过一致性和友善，训练成为增进感情的过程。

diet.en: Feed your Scottish Fold a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their life stage (kitten, adult, senior). Choose protein-rich food with real meat as the first ingredient, and ensure it contains essential taurine for heart and eye health. Divide daily portions into two or three meals to prevent overeating and obesity. Scottish Folds are prone to weight gain, so measure food carefully and limit treats to 10% of daily calories. Provide fresh water at all times, using a fountain if they prefer running water. For joint health, consider foods with glucosamine and chondroitin, especially as they age. Avoid free-feeding and consult your veterinarian for specific dietary needs. A proper diet supports their overall health, shiny coat, and energy levels.
diet.zh: 为苏格兰折耳猫提供适合其生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）的高质量均衡饮食。选择以真实肉类为第一成分的富含蛋白质的食物，并确保含有对心脏和眼睛健康至关重要的牛磺酸。将每日份量分成两到三餐，以防止暴饮暴食和肥胖。苏格兰折耳猫容易体重增加，因此要仔细测量食物，并将零食限制在每日热量的10%以内。随时提供新鲜饮水，如果它们更喜欢流动水，可以使用饮水机。为支持关节健康，可考虑含有葡萄糖胺和软骨素的食物，尤其是在它们年老时。避免自由采食，并咨询兽医以获取具体的饮食建议。合理的饮食有助于它们的整体健康、毛发亮泽和精力充沛。

livingTips.en: Scottish Folds are ideal for apartment living due to their calm, adaptable nature, but they also enjoy secure outdoor enclosures or catios. They are not high-energy cats but need vertical spaces like cat trees and shelves to climb and observe. Their gentle, social temperament makes them excellent companions for children who respect cats, and they usually get along well with other pets, including dogs, when properly introduced. Provide cozy hideaways and soft bedding for napping. Avoid loud, chaotic environments, as they prefer a peaceful home. Their folded ears require careful handling—never pull or tug on them. Ensure windows and balconies are secure. With love, attention, and a safe environment, they thrive as indoor-only cats, living happily for 12-15 years or more.
livingTips.zh: 苏格兰折耳猫因其冷静、适应性强的天性，非常适合公寓生活，但它们也喜欢安全的户外围栏或猫笼。它们不是高能量猫，但需要猫树和架子等垂直空间来攀爬和观察。它们温和、善于社交的天性使它们成为尊重猫的孩子的绝佳伴侣，并且在适当介绍后，它们通常能与其他宠物（包括狗）友好相处。提供舒适的藏身之处和柔软的床铺供小睡。避免嘈杂、混乱的环境，因为它们更喜欢宁静的家。它们的折耳需要小心处理——切勿拉扯或拽动它们。确保窗户和阳台安全。通过爱、关注和安全的环境，它们作为室内猫茁壮成长，快乐地活12-15年或更久。
